V1.description: Manages GitHub organization, repositories, and high-level strategy.

V2.description: Handles repository settings, CI/CD, and access control.

V3.description: Assists with daily coding tasks, automation, and general queries.

V4.description: Focuses on analyzing trading signals and market data.

V5.description: Monitors open positions, margin levels, and calculates risk.

V6.description: Handles placing and modifying orders on trading platforms.

V7.description: Synchronizes data between APIs, databases, and spreadsheets.

V8.description: Tracks system health, API limits, and performance metrics.

V9.description: Manages notifications to Telegram, Discord, and WhatsApp.

V10.description: Runs machine learning models for market prediction.

V11.description: Manages local environment and hardware specific configurations on NUNA (Vivobook Go E1504GAB).
